refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: score = imtemplatematch(image, template) score = imtemplatematch(image, template, method)

listitem.para: Source grayscale or color image in which to search.
Image patch to locate. It must fit inside image and have the same channel count.
Matching method: "ccorr", "ccorr_normed", "ccoeff", or "ccoeff_normed". The default is "ccorr_normed".
Single-channel comparison map of size [image rows - template rows + 1, image columns - template columns + 1]. Each coordinate is the upper-left image position of the template.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses OpenCV matchTemplate to slide the template over every valid source-image position. For all supported methods, the highest score identifies the best match.

refsection.title: Examples
Reference
refsection.para: Example workflow adapted from the official OpenCV Template Matching tutorial.
